authority_boundary.purpose: Make future reconstruction pick coherent organs by fixture contract instead of isolated mined pattern rows.

routing_upgrade.previous_layer: The route decision matrix says which families select, fold, defer, or stay macro-only.
routing_upgrade.this_layer: This artifact states what each selectable organ must carry as a synthetic fixture: inputs, steps, receipts, negative cases, hidden infrastructure, child suborgans, and standalone exclusions.
routing_upgrade.selection_rule: A future leaf candidate is not a single pattern_id. It is an organ spec whose fixture proves the parent rows and carries the required child/evidence rows.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: The binding contract and executable doctrine grammar are inseparable for reconstruction: row identity, source lineage, validator behavior, standards registry, and negative-case handling are the substrate that makes every other organ portable.

synthetic_inputs: one pattern row with complete binding metadata
one pattern row missing governing standard
one paper-module stub with required self-description fields
required_steps: validate rows against strict JSON schemas
generate a standards registry index
emit a source capsule for each accepted row
reject the missing-standard row with a typed validation error
emit an anti-claim stating that the fixture proves grammar mechanics only
negative_cases: schema-invalid row rejected
missing governing standard rejected
paper-module stub without required section rejected
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: schema validation plus deterministic source-capsule count check
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves binding and grammar behavior, not the truth or completeness of the full macro doctrine corpus.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: Formal proof, workingness, diagnostics, negative fixtures, provider proof boundaries, and body-safe lineage all serve one metabolism: claims become checkable evidence rather than prose confidence.

synthetic_inputs: one tiny passing proof or proof-like check
one provider advisory payload that attempts to include proof body
required_steps: run the accepted proof/check
run the rejected proof/check
classify failure into a typed result
reject provider proof-body authority while preserving advisory metadata
build a diagnostic board with accepted, rejected, and advisory evidence classes
negative_cases: provider proof body is policy-rejected
failing proof is retained as evidence rather than erased
lineage builder strips forbidden body fields
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: proof/check command plus schema validation over evidence classes and forbidden body keys
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves evidence routing and proof-boundary behavior; it does not formally verify the whole system.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: Navigation rows compose into one route plane: cluster-first browse, card drilldown, omission receipts, route leases, source coupling, and first-contact replacement behavior.

synthetic_inputs: ten toy rows across two clusters
one standard declaring cluster_flag, flag, and card bands
required_steps: render cluster_flag contents page
drill into selected flag rows
open a card with stable id and omission receipt
reject stale source-coupled projection
replace banned first-contact route with entry route
emit route lease and invalidation inputs
negative_cases: all-row browse is redirected or rejected
stale projection cannot claim current authority
banned first-contact route gets replacement command
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: route projection check over ids, omissions, source-coupling status, and banned-route replacement
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves route-plane behavior, not the truth of the full macro corpus or the current public leaf set.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: WorkItem state, mission landing, claims, scoped commits, exact receipts, dependency unlocks, contract gaps, CAP cartography, and currentness overlays are one work-survival metabolism.

synthetic_inputs: one fake repo path with active claim
required_steps: capture and classify WorkItems
build missing-contract and dependency views
bind a landing attempt to session, WorkItem, path, read set, and write set
reject write admission without binding
perform private-index scoped commit over exact owned path
reject stale-parent reland
run finalizer replay to drain exact receipt
project CAP/currentness/mechanism views as derived read models
sweep orphaned session and release claim
negative_cases: ready-but-hard-blocked WorkItem is not schedulable
write without WorkItem/path binding is rejected
stale expected-parent CAS refuses reland
CAP cartography marks overflow and derived-not-authority
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: event-log rebuild plus dependency, missing-contract, claim, scoped-commit, and finalizer assertions
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves work-survival mechanics over synthetic rows; it does not expose or prioritize the private Task Ledger backlog.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: Agent observability is only strong when traces alter future routing: route compliance, hook coverage, session attribution, Type A/B axes, reducer authority, and anti-pattern retirement are one behavior-governance loop.

synthetic_inputs: one agent trace with proper entry route
one agent trace with banned route attempt
required_steps: classify trace by actor axes and route compliance
prove hook shadow would intervene on banned route
retire matching anti-pattern debt through observed evidence
preserve regression evidence as advisory history
route reducer decision below Type A authority
negative_cases: telemetry row with no behavior change remains evidence-only
wrong actor axis cannot claim Type A authority
hook output cannot read unbounded private state
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: route-compliance assertions plus debt-retirement and lifecycle-budget checks
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves behavior-governance mechanics, not live introspection accuracy across all real agents.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: Provider, prompt, feed, annex, and memory-adjacent rows are safe only as anti-corruption membranes: finite pull, bounded metadata, reducer review, quarantine, cooldown, and diagnostic envelopes.

synthetic_inputs: one prompt metadata row with body omitted
required_steps: enforce finite pull and no-retry budget
deduplicate worker run by fingerprint
salvage valid response rows and quarantine invalid rows
review candidate row patch through Type A reducer
aggregate feed diagnostics with bounded warning/partial-failure lists
route annex candidate through pretriage before adoption
negative_cases: provider output cannot mutate source files directly
prompt body is not copied into metadata index
untraceable bridge row is quarantined
unbounded feed warnings are clipped with overflow counters
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: schema validation plus reducer authority and forbidden-source mutation checks
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves external-boundary mechanics; it does not adopt provider, prompt, feed, memory, or annex content as doctrine.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: Bridge, phase, detached jobs, resource capacity, continuation packets, heartbeat, resume, and closeout transitions are one continuity runtime.

required_steps: write continuation packet before yield
emit heartbeat/liveness row
gate worker count by resource pressure
record skip/veto receipt for intentionally skipped work
resume from packet exactly once
write closeout transition receipt
negative_cases: missing packet cannot claim resumability
blocked resource pressure suppresses parallel worker dispatch
same packet cannot be consumed twice
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: continuation packet schema check plus heartbeat/resume idempotency assertions
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves disk-first continuity mechanics over fake transport; it does not prove real provider or UI uptime.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: Raw seed, memory, writer discipline, doctrine population, recursive self-improvement, and prompt adoption are one private-root metabolism. Its portable form is synthetic pressure becoming governed doctrine under validation.

required_steps: atomize paragraph into shards without using private raw seed
route shards to candidate concept/mechanism/principle lanes
block memory fact from becoming shadow doctrine
validate candidate in advisory then strict modes
promote only with evidence and probation marker
emit writer/voice anti-claim
negative_cases: memory fact cannot bypass doctrine population
writer voice cannot mutate substrate rule directly
single-signal paper-module pressure is rejected
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: candidate queue schema plus advisory/strict validation and memory-shadow gate checks
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves private-root transformation gates; it does not expose, summarize, or stand in for real raw seed, memory, or operator voice.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: Frontend Station, component index, renderer passport, pixel/load timing, cockpit edit override, and wayfinding proof rows are a typed-view specimen over synthetic state, not the live cockpit itself.

required_steps: render synthetic view contract
check component index confidence membrane
compare navigation graph against route-plane source ids
emit renderer passport and pixel/load receipts
reject edit override without proof receipt
negative_cases: live cockpit data cannot enter fixture
edit override without proof is rejected
nav graph mismatch emits failure receipt
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: typed-view schema, nav graph consistency check, and render receipt assertions
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves typed-view contract behavior over fake state; it is not the live Station cockpit and carries no operator/runtime private data.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: Publication, ref, readiness, recipient, and approval rows are one authority-gradient guard: evidence can be real while action remains blocked, and approval binds exact candidate identity rather than a vague latest state.

synthetic_inputs: green portability report at commit A
proof handle table with green, stale, and red gates
required_steps: separate local landing from remote publication
reject publish claim until remote ref hash matches
classify portability proof as current or stale by changed-source scope
resolve proof handle status by weakest live gate
compile recipient packet as no-send evidence
emit dry-run switch plan with mutated_external_state false until exact tuple approval
negative_cases: local commit cannot claim pushed
dated green proof cannot claim current after included-source change
recipient reply cannot approve send or root access
operator yes to latest HEAD is rejected when exact tuple differs
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: schema validation plus hash/ref equality, path-scoped freshness, weakest-gate resolution, and dry-run no-external-mutation checks
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves authority-boundary mechanics; it is not public release permission, outreach authorization, or a dissemination leaf.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: The formal/oracle policy rows are one body-safe proof-learning membrane: problem identity ablation, adversarial renaming, sidecar firewalls, action posterior tables, loop pruning, leakage detection, and tactic gates all defend proof authority from hidden truth leakage.

synthetic_inputs: oracle sidecar with withheld truth fields
provider receipt containing one forbidden marker
required_steps: prove action counts are invariant under problem-id ablation
replay accepted renamed solutions through the verifier
block forward packets from carrying sidecar truth fields
compute posterior action table and prune duplicate goal states
quarantine provider receipt with forbidden truth marker
permit induction only when visible-head gate passes
negative_cases: problem-id-specific action counts fail ablation
forward packet includes ideal_body
provider receipt echoes truth-side marker
induction fires without visible recursive head
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: schema validation plus equality checks, forbidden-field scan, hash-dedupe assertion, and verifier replay receipt
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves proof-learning boundary mechanics; it does not prove an actual theorem corpus or expose benchmark truth bodies.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: The formal-prover lab rows are one evaluation organ: context recipes, premise retrieval, strategy selection, undeclared-prior quarantine, local support probes, benchmark ladders, split-leakage firewalls, provider/oracle queues, repair-lane gates, decisive-experiment queues, library/corpus readiness, tactic availability, target-shape routing, and RING2 precision/recall all regulate proof-lab metabolism together.

synthetic_inputs: toy problem ladder with train/dev/test splits
toy provider context recipes with byte ceilings
toy provider/oracle receipts with accepted, quarantined, and rate-limited cases
toy tactic availability and target-shape records
required_steps: retrieve premises through the allowed split filter
classify strategy before oracle material is visible
strip truth-side fields from forward benchmark manifests
quarantine undeclared library priors separately from premise-budget violations
gate repair attempts by proof-level Lean rejection and strategy novelty
probe corpus and tactic availability before dispatch
emit precision/recall, provider-match, and decisive-queue receipts
negative_cases: provider context includes ideal_body
test-split premise is retrieved from a train-only pool
provider repair fires after terminal failure without a new strategy
Mathlib-dependent tactic runs when corpus readiness says absent
rate-limit event is counted as math failure
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: schema validation plus forbidden-field scan, split-filter assertion, strategy enum check, repair-novelty gate, tactic availability probe receipt, and precision/recall aggregation check
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves formal-prover lab governance over synthetic problems; it is not a theorem prover product and does not claim external benchmark performance.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: The prediction/oracle rows are a domain-specific reconciliation membrane: cross-lane contradictions, evidence hierarchy, valid target universe, deterministic grading, hindsight classification, grounding firewall, and dossier mutation are one proof-to-learning loop.

required_steps: force CP1 to resolve every named bifurcation
apply epistemic hierarchy with explicit override defense
reject CP2 target outside valid universe
grade realized target diff before interpretive oracle critique
confine truth-side influence to oracle metadata
emit gated dossier mutation proposals
negative_cases: unresolved contradiction cannot lock CP1
Tier 4 evidence overrides Tier 1 without defense
target outside valid universe is rejected
truth-side ledger id appears in subject evidence
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: synthetic graph validator, target-universe gate, deterministic diff grader, and grounding-id firewall
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves reconciliation mechanics over fake market data; it is not a prediction product or trading signal.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: The raw-seed alchemy rows are one pre-doctrine routing organ: orphan cluster emergence, doctrine triple synthesis, empirical voice catalog, review-plane routing, keyword navigation, reversal drift audits, and archaeological coverage gates all protect voice-to-doctrine metabolism.

required_steps: surface one orphan shard cluster
route shards through six-plane review gate
compile one doctrine triple proposal
generate bounded keyphrase navigation hints
audit reversal drift with integer-count command
drop archaeologically covered shard before import
negative_cases: private raw seed cannot enter fixture
covered archaeological shard is dropped
unrouted shard cannot mutate doctrine
drift claim without check command is rejected
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: synthetic-shard schema, route-plane enum validation, coverage decision check, and reversal audit command receipt
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves the voice-to-doctrine route; it does not expose real operator voice or authorize hand-editing raw seed.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: The autonomy/reaction rows form one runtime dispatch membrane: governor mode, reaction dedupe, wake barriers, lifecycle-boundary signals, baton closeout, and provider row scoring must travel together to prevent uncontrolled automation.

required_steps: thread governor mode through dispatch eligibility
dedupe reactions by signal and terminal outcome fingerprints
install wake barrier until subprocess exits
fire lifecycle-boundary reaction without polling
compile baton closeout contract for each plan step
score provider row jobs without paid-spend mutation
negative_cases: reaction fires twice for same terminal fingerprint
new reaction evaluates while barrier is active
plan step without baton closeout is rejected
provider score cannot mutate external provider state
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: state-machine schema plus dedupe, barrier, baton, and dry-run provider score assertions
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves dispatch control; it is not an always-on automation deployment.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: The market rows are one synthetic-domain evidence organ: situation graph, refusal-first gate, lifecycle classifier, cross-lane mapper, calculator-derived evidence, four-lens salience, and market-clock anchoring are inseparable prerequisites for any market-facing claim.

synthetic_inputs: three market situations with evidence and counterevidence
required_steps: dedupe market fire points by stable digest
build evidence graph with counterevidence and claim levels
fail closed on unknown cross-feed claim
classify prediction-market lifecycle before CLOB enrichment
run structural then directional cross-lane mapper
compute derived calculator score and four-lens salience
negative_cases: unknown cross-feed claim is refused
resolved market cannot be treated as live CLOB failure
situation without counterevidence is rejected
cross-lane comparison without shared fire point is rejected
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: synthetic feed schema plus readiness gate, lifecycle classifier, evidence graph, and stable time-anchor assertions
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves market-evidence routing mechanics over fake data; it is not investment advice, a live feed, or a prediction signal.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: The entry/agent-behavior rows form one governance organ: provisional axiom pressure, protected entry payload floors, route-lease trace feedback, principle-shaped CAP assimilation, and operator autonomy phrase standards all regulate agent behavior before it hardens into doctrine.

synthetic_inputs: toy entry packet with low budget
candidate axiom match with evidence and query-only match
agent route trace consuming or drifting from route lease
required_steps: suppress query-token-only axiom match into receipt
preserve nonnegotiable entry payload floor during compaction
classify route lease use as consumed, returned, or drifted
route principle-like failure through CAP assimilation before doctrine mutation
bridge operator autonomy phrase to active standard diagnostic
negative_cases: candidate axiom is promoted as active law
entry payload drops protected floor under budget
route lease drift emits no feedback
local failure mints principle without sibling CAP search
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: entry packet schema, protected-floor assertion, route trace classifier, CAP assimilation receipt, and phrase-standard sync check
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves behavior-governance routing; it does not mint new active principles or change operator authority.

organ_fixture_specs.why_this_is_one_organ: Response-flight evidence, response-attention leases, HUD action proof receipts, and sidecar-continuation lifecycle receipts are one operator bridge attention stack. Selecting any row alone would confuse observation, obligation, proof, and continuation state.

synthetic_inputs: two fake ChatGPT tab conversations with prompt epochs and copy acknowledgements
HUD action queue with copy, mark seen, mark pending, duplicate, and proof-missing actions
sidecar continuation candidate with hashes and lifecycle actions
required_steps: classify candidate versus confirmed response flights before minting obligations
persist pending, completed_unseen, seen, rejected, stale, and superseded lease states
require proof metadata before response-copy or sidecar-copy receipts can claim state change
preserve newer pending lineage against stale copy or weak hidden-tab observations
fold sidecar candidate lifecycle into bridge continuity without treating copy as application
negative_cases: candidate network request cannot mint pending gold before confirmed stream evidence
old copy receipt cannot clear a newer pending lease
metadata receipt cannot retain clipboard text or private response body
copied sidecar text cannot mark the candidate applied without matching lifecycle receipt
fixture_contract.validator_or_check: synthetic observer reducer assertions plus metadata-only receipt scan, lease transition idempotency check, and sidecar lineage-match check
fixture_contract.anti_claim: This fixture proves private operator response-attention routing over synthetic tab data; it is not a public release leaf, browser automation promise, or raw transcript memory export.

strongest_next_fixture_order.why_first: It supplies row identity, grammar, source lineage, and validation vocabulary for all other fixtures.
It turns downstream claims into checkable receipts and defines negative-case proof boundaries.
It makes future organs discoverable and prevents isolated projection leaves.
It proves work, status, claims, landing, and currentness as one metabolism.

next_type_a_pass.recommended_task: Convert the first four organ fixture specs into executable synthetic fixture directories or a machine-readable fixture manifest.
do_not_do: do not rebuild public microcosm leaves
do not use private raw seed, live Task Ledger content, prompt bodies, provider payloads, or live cockpit data
do not select global_no_standalone_until_reframed rows as leaf roots
next_type_a_pass.acceptance: Each executable fixture has synthetic input, command or reducer, expected output, negative case, validator/check command, anti-claim, and source-row binding back to this artifact.
